task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or interface is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient demographics report section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reporting interface within LibreHealth EHR is open, specifically for patient demographics, clinical reports, or patient searches.

task_completion.description: Apply filters for male patients born before January 1, 1960
task_completion.visual_evidence: Filter criteria are visible in the report interface, showing 'Male' selected for sex/gender and a date condition for Date of Birth before January 1, 1960 (e.g., < 1960-01-01).

task_completion.description: Generate the report and identify the total count
task_completion.visual_evidence: The generated report or results table is visible in the EHR interface, showing the filtered patients and ideally displaying the total count of matching patients (1002).

task_completion.description: Write the total count to the specified output file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file '/home/ga/patient_report_count.txt' with the integer '1002' written on the first line.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface to generate the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the EHR GUI in a web browser to set filters and view results, rather than querying the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI using terminal SQL commands
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening a MySQL prompt or running SQL scripts in the terminal to find the patient count.

integrity.description: The output file contains only the integer
integrity.visual_evidence: The file '/home/ga/patient_report_count.txt' must contain only the number '1002' on the first line, without any conversational text, labels, or additional formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth count for male patients born before January 1, 1960 (with non-null, non-empty DOB) is exactly 1002. The agent must write this integer to the first line of /home/ga/patient_report_count.txt.
